The duo are both musicians, actors, and champion","favicon":"https://celebritytalent.net/favicon.ico","raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kcpoSpVvmpU","score":0.6219319,"title":"Lightship / Beatbox Education","content":"Lightship / Beatbox Education
Kaila Mullady
12400 subscribers
149 likes
2722 views
19 May 2018
World Beatbox Champion Kaila Mullady and American Beatbox Champion Mark Martin have teamed up to form Lightship, spreading the art of beatboxing all over the world. Beatboxing is the art of imitating and creating music and sound effects using only the human voice, and can be adapted for any style of music you can imagine. Originating in New York City during the early 80’s, it has since spread all over the world and become an international phenomenon. Lightship believes that beatboxing helps you find the power of your voice, building confidence to stand up for yourself and others. The first step to speaking up is making a sound. In a world of slashed budgets and cultural barriers, beatboxing requires no expensive equipment. All you need is your imagination. 

With over 16 years of combined teaching experience, Kaila and Mark have trained under some of New York City’s top teaching artists. Kaila started her teaching career in 2012 under world renowned teaching artists Kid Lucky, Baba Israel, D-Cross and Yako 440. Kaila first promoted reading and writing through the Hip Hop Book club that taught song writing and story remixing in Libraries across New York City. Since then she has taught all over the world from the Bronx to Harvard and the United Nations. Mark Martín has been beatboxing throughout New York City since 2007, graduating from New York University in 2011, designing a major around the idea of beatbox as a language. There, he studied phonetics and created a system teaching beatboxing using the International Phonetic Alphabet (IPA). While in NYC he taught with several different NYC based non-profit organizations. From 2011-2015, Mark was a leading member of the international theater group Voca People, where he taught workshops all over the world. Both Kaila and Mark teach private 1 on 1 lessons in person and over Skype, focusing on beatboxing, singing, vocal health, songwriting, battle technique, and self expression. 

 One of the most fulfilling parts of Lightships career has been teaching workshops and assemblies promoting reading, writing, finding your voice, and anti- bullying. Their work using beatboxing as a tool for speech therapy led to a partnership with New York University, which brought together students of various disciplines to design a class specifically to build tools for blind and handicapped students. Giving back to communities is an integral part of Lightship’s creative process which motivated them to take over producing the American Beatbox Championships in 2016, the largest platform for Beatboxers in North America.

Whether on stage in front of beatbox fans, in an auditorium speaking to students, or helping staff training at a corporate event, Lightship has seen the benefits of beatboxing and how it allows people to open up, work together and build listening skills, no matter what their musical skill level is. Lightship believes beatboxing is the perfect vehicle to allow audiences to come out of their shell and build confidence in their voice.

____________________________________________

Kaila Mullady is a New York based performer – The 2015 World Beatbox Champion, 2014 America Vice Beatbox Champion, 3x Loop station champion and 3x, reigning Beatrhyme Champion. Kaila performs all over NYC and the country infusing beatboxing, singing, rapping, poetry and theater to push the boundaries of creativity and show just what the human instrument is capable of. Multi-instrumentalist, using a RC 300 she is able to loop guitar, beatboxing and vocals to become a one woman band. Part of NYC’s premier freestyle comedy rap group North Coast, incorporating improv comedy and hip hop. Teaching workshops all across the country promoting reading, writing and finding your own soul music. Giving back to communities and volunteering is a big part of Kaila’s creative process

answer_translation: {"be":"Stitch - малайзійскі бітбоксер, вядомы выступамі на Grand Beatbox Battle. Ён атрымаў прызнанне ў 2021 годзе і працягвае ўдзельнічаць у бітбокс-спаборніцтвах. Яго унікальны стыль і навыкі прынеслі яму прыхільнікаў.","da":"Stitch er en malaysisk beatboxer kendt for optrædener i Grand Beatbox Battle. Han opnåede anerkendelse i 2021 og fortsætter med at deltage i beatbox-konkurrencer. Hans unikke stil og færdigheder har givet ham en fanskare.","de":"Stitch ist ein malaysischer Beatboxer, der für seine Auftritte bei der Grand Beatbox Battle bekannt ist. Er erlangte 2021 Anerkennung und nimmt weiterhin an Beatbox-Wettbewerben teil. Sein einzigartiger Stil und seine Fähigkeiten haben ihm eine Fangemeinde eingebracht.","en":"Stitch is a Malaysian beatboxer known for performances in the Grand Beatbox Battle. He gained recognition in 2021 and continues to participate in beatbox competitions. His unique style and skills have earned him a following.","es":"Stitch es un beatboxer malasio conocido por sus actuaciones en el Grand Beatbox Battle. Ganó reconocimiento en 2021 y continúa participando en competiciones de beatbox. Su estilo y habilidades únicos le han ganado seguidores.","et":"Stitch on Malaisia beatboxer, kes on tuntud esinemiste poolest Grand Beatbox Battle’is. Ta saavutas tuntuse 2021. aastal ja osaleb jätkuvalt beatboxi võistlustel. Tema ainulaadne stiil ja oskused on talle järgijaskonna toonud.","ga":"Is beatboxer Malaisiach é Stitch atá aitheanta as a chuid léirithe sa Grand Beatbox Battle. Fuair sé aitheantas in 2021 agus leanann sé ag glacadh páirte i gcomórtais beatbox. Tá lucht leanúna tuillte aige mar gheall ar a stíl agus a chuid scileanna uathúla.","hu":"Stitch egy malajziai beatboxer, aki a Grand Beatbox Battle fellépéseiről ismert. 2021-ben szerzett elismerést, és továbbra is részt vesz beatbox versenyeken. Egyedi stílusa és képességei követőkre találtak.","it":"Stitch è un beatboxer malese noto per le sue performance nel Grand Beatbox Battle. Ha ottenuto riconoscimenti nel 2021 e continua a partecipare a competizioni di beatbox. Il suo stile unico e le sue abilità gli hanno fatto guadagnare un seguito.","ja":"Stitchは、Grand Beatbox Battleでのパフォーマンスで知られるマレーシアのビートボクサーです。彼は2021年に認知度を高め、ビートボックスコンペティションに引き続き参加しています。彼のユニークなスタイルとスキルは、彼に多くのファンをもたらしました。","ko":"Stitch는 Grand Beatbox Battle에서 공연으로 알려진 말레이시아 비트박서입니다. 그는 2021년에 인정을 받았으며 비트박스 대회에 계속 참가하고 있습니다. 그의 독특한 스타일과 실력은 그에게 많은 팬을 얻게 했습니다.","ms":"Stitch ialah seorang beatboxer Malaysia yang terkenal dengan persembahan di Grand Beatbox Battle. Beliau mendapat pengiktirafan pada tahun 2021 dan terus menyertai pertandingan beatbox. Gaya dan kemahirannya yang unik telah memberikannya pengikut.","pl":"Stitch to malezyjski beatboxer znany z występów w Grand Beatbox Battle. Zdobył uznanie w 2021 roku i nadal bierze udział w zawodach beatboxowych. Jego unikalny styl i umiejętności przyniosły mu popularność.","pt":"Stitch é um beatboxer malaio conhecido por suas performances no Grand Beatbox Battle. Ele ganhou reconhecimento em 2021 e continua a participar de competições de beatbox. Seu estilo e habilidades únicas conquistaram seguidores.","ta":"ஸ்டிச் (Stitch) என்பவர் மலேசியாவைச் சேர்ந்த பீட் பாக்ஸர் ஆவார், கிராண்ட் பீட் பாக்ஸ் போரில் (Grand Beatbox Battle) நிகழ்த்தியதற்காக அறியப்படுகிறார். 2021-ஆம் ஆண்டில் அவர் அங்கீகாரம் பெற்றார், மேலும் பீட் பாக்ஸ் போட்டிகளில் தொடர்ந்து பங்கேற்று வருகிறார். அவருடைய தனித்துவமான பாணியும் திறமையும் அவருக்குப் பெரும் ரசிகர்களைப் பெற்றுத் தந்துள்ளது.","zh_Hans_CN":"Stitch是一位马来西亚的口技表演者，以在Grand Beatbox Battle中的表演而闻名。他于2021年获得认可，并继续参加口技比赛。他独特的风格和技巧为他赢得了众多粉丝。","zh_Hant_TW":"Stitch 是一位馬來西亞的 beatboxer，以其在 Grand Beatbox Battle 中的表演而聞名。他於 2021 年嶄露頭角，並持續參與 beatbox 比賽。他獨特的風格和技巧為他贏得了一群追隨者。"}

El equipo está formado por yuto y Riki.","ja":"Rhythminationは、革新的なサウンドデザインとダイナミックなパフォーマンスで知られる日本のビートボックスチームです。彼らはアジアタッグチームビートボックスチャンピオンシップで優勝しました。彼らのYouTubeチャンネルには428人の登録者と3本の動画があります。","ta":"Rhythmination என்பது ஒரு ஜப்பானிய பீட்பாக்ஸ் குழுவாகும், இது அவர்களின் புதுமையான ஒலி வடிவமைப்பு மற்றும் தாள திறன்களுக்காக அறியப்படுகிறது. அவர்கள் 2019 ஆசிய டேக் டீம் பீட்பாக்ஸ் சாம்பியன்ஷிப்பை வென்றனர். இந்த குழுவில் yuto மற்றும் Riki ஆகியோர் உள்ளனர்.","zh_Hans_CN":"Rhythmination是一支日本拍击口技团队，以其创新的音效设计和节奏技巧而闻名。他们赢得了2019年亚洲组合拍击口技锦标赛。该团队由yuto和Riki组成。"}

Jego beatboxing zapewnił mu czołowe miejsce w nowej scenie beatboxowej.","ta":"Trung Bao ஒரு புகழ்பெற்ற பீட் பாக்ஸ் கலைஞர் ஆவார். இவர் தனது புதுமையான திறன்களுக்காக அறியப்படுகிறார் மற்றும் 2017 இல் உலக பீட் பாக்ஸ் கேம்ப் சாம்பியன்ஷிப்பை வென்றார். இவரது தொழில்நுட்ப பீட் பாக்ஸ் ஃப்ரீஸ்டைல்களுக்காக இவர் கொண்டாடப்படுகிறார் மற்றும் YouTube இல் பிரபலமானார். இவரது பீட் பாக்ஸிங், புதிய தலைமுறை பீட் பாக்ஸிங் துறையில் ஒரு முக்கிய இடத்தைப் பெற்றுள்ளது.","zh_Hans_CN":"Trung Bao是一位著名的口技艺术家，以其创新的技巧而闻名，并于2017年赢得了世界口技营锦标赛冠军。他因其高超的口技自由式表演而受到赞誉，并在YouTube上获得了很高的人气。他的口技表演使他在新派口技界占据了重要地位。","zh_Hant_TW":"Trung Bao 是一位著名的拍瓶嘴藝術家，以其創新的技巧而聞名，並於 2017 年贏得了世界拍瓶嘴營錦標賽冠軍。他以其技術精湛的自由式拍瓶嘴表演而聞名，並在 YouTube 上廣受歡迎。他的拍瓶嘴技巧為他在新派拍瓶嘴界贏得了頂尖的地位。"}

The GBB24 Solo Battles kick off with a very good battle. From Saudi Arabia, Abo Ice, who placed 4th at GBB23, returns stronger than ever, taking the top spot in this year’s eliminations. Facing him is South Africa’s rising star, Remix, the Africa MENA Qualifier champion, making his debut on the GBB stage after reaching 8th place at the eliminations.

answer_translation: {"be":"Off the Box beatbox - гэта бітбокс-гурт, вядомы сваім інавацыйным і наватарскім стылем. Яны прызнаны за свой уклад у брытанскую сцэну бітбоксінгу. Іх праца ўключае супрацоўніцтва і выступленні, якія дэманструюць іх навыкі.","et":"Off the Box beatbox viitab beatboxingu grupile, mis on tuntud oma uuendusliku ja piireületava stiili poolest. Nad on tunnustatud oma panuse eest Ühendkuningriigi beatboxingu areenile. Nende töö hõlmab koostööprojekte ja esinemisi, mis rõhutavad nende oskusi.","hu":"Az Off the Box beatbox egy olyan beatbox-csapatra utal, amely innovatív és határokat feszegető stílusáról ismert. Elismerést szereztek a brit beatbox szcénában elért hozzájárulásaikért. Munkásságuk magában foglalja az együttműködéseket és előadásokat, amelyek kiemelik képességeiket.","ja":"Off the Box ビートボックスは、革新的で限界を押し広げるスタイルで知られるビートボクシンググループを指します。彼らは英国のビートボクシングシーンへの貢献で認められています。彼らの活動には、スキルを際立たせるコラボレーションやパフォーマンスが含まれます。","no":"Off the Box beatbox refererer til en beatboxing-gruppe kjent for sin innovative og grensesprengende stil. De er anerkjent for sine bidrag til den britiske beatboxingscenen. Deres arbeid inkluderer samarbeid og forestillinger som fremhever deres ferdigheter.","zh_Hant_TW":"Off the Box beatbox 指的是一個以其創新和突破界限的風格而聞名的 beatboxing 團體。他們因對英國 beatboxing 界所做的貢獻而受到認可。他們的作品包括展示他們技藝的合作與表演。"}

answer_translation: {"en":"Polyrhythm refers to a beatboxing technique involving complex, overlapping rhythms. It is performed by B-Art and Timmeh, known as Polyrhythm. They are recognized for their intricate and synchronized drum patterns.","it":"La poliritmia si riferisce a una tecnica di beatboxing che coinvolge ritmi complessi e sovrapposti. È eseguita da B-Art e Timmeh, noti come Polyrhythm. Sono riconosciuti per i loro intricati e sincronizzati pattern di batteria.","ja":"ポリリズムは、複雑で重なり合うリズムを伴うビートボクシングテクニックを指します。これは、Polyrhythmとして知られるB-ArtとTimmehによって実行されます。彼らは、複雑で同期のとれたドラムパターンで知られています。","ta":"Polyrhythm என்பது சிக்கலான, ஒன்றுடன் ஒன்று இணையும் தாளங்களை உள்ளடக்கிய பீட்பாக்ஸிங் நுட்பத்தைக் குறிக்கிறது. இது B-Art மற்றும் Timmeh ஆகியோரால் நிகழ்த்தப்படுகிறது, அவர்கள் Polyrhythm என்று அழைக்கப்படுகிறார்கள். அவர்கள் தங்கள் நுட்பமான மற்றும் ஒத்திசைக்கப்பட்ட ட்ரம் பேட்டர்ன்களுக்காக அங்கீகரிக்கப்படுகிறார்கள்."}

Beatboxing was born in 1980’s NYC as one of the five elements of hip-hop with the guidance of legends like Doug E Fresh, Kid Lucky, and Rahzel. After decades of evolution underground and overseas, innovation continues to push the art form. 

American Beatbox is a platform for the beatboxing community to carry the torch into the future, dedicated to helping beatboxers reach their potential and connect with audiences worldwide via content, livestreams, merchandise, battles and events.

The American Beatbox Championships is the premiere beatbox competition in the USA. Every November, over Veteran’s Day Weekend, the most talented beatboxers from around the country come to NYC to compete for the titles, bragging rights, and a spot to represent their country at the World Champs. 2019 marked the ten year anniversary of the ABCs, and the first official year of American Beatbox launching as a platform. 

Please subscribe and turn on post notifications to be the first to see all new videos. We have a lot coming your way! Thank you for watching #americanbeatbox

Іх праца прызнана ў супольнасці бітбоксераў.","en":"Fabulous Wadness is a French beatbox duo, consisting of Wawad and Beatness, and won French beatbox championships in 2014 and 2016. They are known for their cover of Martin Garrix's \"Animals.\" Their work is recognized in the beatbox community.","es":"Fabulous Wadness es un dúo francés de beatbox, compuesto por Wawad y Beatness, que ganó campeonatos franceses de beatbox en 2014 y 2016. Son conocidos por su cover de \"Animals\" de Martin Garrix. Su trabajo es reconocido en la comunidad de beatbox.","it":"Fabulous Wadness è un duo francese di beatbox, composto da Wawad e Beatness, che ha vinto i campionati francesi di beatbox nel 2014 e nel 2016. Sono noti per la loro cover di \"Animals\" di Martin Garrix. Il loro lavoro è riconosciuto nella comunità del beatbox.","ja":"Fabulous Wadness は、Wawad と Beatness からなるフランスのビートボックスデュオで、2014年と2016年にフランスビートボックス選手権で優勝しました。彼らは Martin Garrix の \"Animals\" のカバーで知られています。彼らの作品はビートボックスコミュニティで認められています。","ms":"Fabulous Wadness adalah duo beatbox Perancis, terdiri daripada Wawad dan Beatness, dan memenangi kejohanan beatbox Perancis pada tahun 2014 dan 2016. Mereka terkenal dengan saduran lagu Martin Garrix \"Animals\". Karya mereka diiktiraf dalam komuniti beatbox.","pt":"Fabulous Wadness é um duo francês de beatbox, composto por Wawad e Beatness, e venceu campeonatos franceses de beatbox em 2014 e 2016. Eles são conhecidos pela sua cover de \"Animals\" de Martin Garrix. O seu trabalho é reconhecido na comunidade de beatbox.","zh_Hans_CN":"Fabulous Wadness是一个法国的beatbox二人组，由Wawad和Beatness组成，他们曾获得2014年和2016年的法国beatbox锦标赛冠军。他们以翻唱Martin Garrix的歌曲“Animals”而闻名。他们的作品在beatbox界得到了认可。"}

Thank you for watching.
This is my loopstation wildcard for Grand Beatbox Battle 2025 World League.
I was inspired by the songs in movies such as The Greatest Showman to create this track. In creating this track, I aimed to make it simple and easy to understand, moving, and to make the most of the voice. My favorite part is the part in the second half where the brass section-like sounds are piled up. I would be happy if you close your eyes and feel like you are listening to an orchestra in a hall.
